dialogue1.phrase: Congratulations! You survived the first quarter at RetroCODE.

dialogue2.phrase: Now things get a little more complicated. And by 'a little', I mean 'considerably'.

dialogue3.phrase: From now on, architectures don't just affect quality attributes. They also impact other important project aspects.

dialogue4.phrase: For example: development time! This aspect represents the time needed to implement the system.

dialogue5.phrase: And there's more! The higher the implementation complexity… the harder it will be to fix bugs that appear during the project.

dialogue6.phrase: But everything will be fine! In the worst case, the world will end along with us.
